# Generated by Copilot under FIS AI Policy
# ! Evalutation ONLY ! Developed using the Github Copilot Feature Testing org - NOT FOR PRODUCTION WORK
# Submit order then immediately cancel it
Send:NewOrderSingle:11=$UNIQUE|55=MSFT|54=1|40=2|38=100|44=$RNDNUM[200,400/0.01]|59=0
Send:OrderCancelRequest:11=$UNIQUE|41=$LASTUNIQUE|55=MSFT|54=1|38=100|60=$TIMESTAMP
